_doc: Runnable port of V's audience-loop pipeline. Four stages (reaction × replays, classification, boundary, gap) over personas × variants. Reads personas in V's nested data shape directly. Boundary + gap stages return #f when MIN-FOR-BOUNDARY isn't met — the substrate replaces the legacy reactor's depsReady gating with plain conditionals.

env.product-context: here.build — a visual app builder pitched at developers and small agencies.
